codex.deliveryRule: Codex comments are engagement or findings evidence. Implementation delivery requires a verifiable GitHub PR, branch, commit, or merge.

statuses.codex_dispatched: A Codex task was posted but no Codex response has been verified.
statuses.codex_engaged: Codex responded or began work, but delivery evidence is not established.
statuses.codex_findings_posted: Codex posted review or investigation findings; useful for review, not implementation delivery.
statuses.codex_pr_open: A GitHub PR from Codex or a Codex-materialized branch is visible and open.
statuses.codex_pr_merged: A Codex-materialized PR or commit has been merged.
statuses.codex_unverified_output: Codex claimed work, but no GitHub PR, branch, commit, or merge is verifiable.

copilot.deliveryRule: Copilot delivery is counted when a GitHub PR exists and passes review/validation.

statuses.copilot_assigned: Issue assigned to Copilot coding agent.

workItems.expectedArtifact: model-fabric adapter contract fixtures and tests
workItems.deliveryEvidence: Codex issue dispatch recorded; no verifiable GitHub PR, branch, commit, or merge is recorded for this item yet.
workItems.acceptanceSummary: Adapter contracts reference functional service registry entries and stay deterministic/local-only.

workItems.expectedArtifact: functional model surface contracts, adapter fixtures, and validator tests
workItems.deliveryEvidence: Copilot is the implementation materialization lane; delivery requires a visible GitHub PR and green validation.
workItems.acceptanceSummary: Functional model surface contracts reference deterministic service registry entries; make validate stays green.

workItems.expectedArtifact: model-router release dry-run artifacts and provenance metadata
workItems.deliveryEvidence: Codex engagement may include findings or local work; delivery is not counted until a GitHub artifact is visible.
workItems.acceptanceSummary: make release-dry-run emits deterministic artifact metadata without publishing a release.

workItems.expectedArtifact: guardrail-fabric release dry-run artifacts and provenance metadata
workItems.deliveryEvidence: Copilot issue assignment is the implementation trigger; PR delivery evidence is required before completion.
workItems.acceptanceSummary: make release-dry-run remains local-only and make validate stays green.

workItems.expectedArtifact: model-governance-ledger release dry-run artifacts and provenance metadata
workItems.deliveryEvidence: Codex findings comments are useful review/investigation evidence; they are not implementation delivery without PR/branch/commit/merge.
workItems.acceptanceSummary: make release-dry-run emits checksums/provenance without storing model weights, datasets, or claims.

workItems.expectedArtifact: agent-registry release dry-run artifacts and provenance metadata
workItems.deliveryEvidence: Delivery evidence should point to the merged Copilot PR when the register is refreshed from live GitHub state.
workItems.acceptanceSummary: make release-dry-run is deterministic and does not add identity-provider integration or credentials.

workItems.expectedArtifact: model-fabric release formula templates and documentation
workItems.deliveryEvidence: Delivery evidence should point to the merged Copilot PR when the register is refreshed from live GitHub state.
workItems.acceptanceSummary: Templates contain placeholders only; no fake URLs or checksums; make validate remains green.

workItems.expectedArtifact: homebrew-prophet Codex-reviewed versioned formula updates and release artifact attestations
workItems.deliveryEvidence: Codex may provide useful output, but this item is not delivered by Codex unless a verifiable GitHub artifact exists.
workItems.acceptanceSummary: Versioned formulae reference immutable checksums from published release artifacts; no fake URLs; make validate stays green.

workItems.expectedArtifact: Codex lane semantics, work register validation, and dashboard rollup wording
workItems.deliveryEvidence: Codex produced detailed comments on issue #230 but no verifiable GitHub PR, branch, or commit at verification time; Copilot or coordinator materialization is required.
workItems.acceptanceSummary: Register distinguishes Codex review/investigation engagement from verifiable delivery evidence and validates as coordination metadata.

workItems.expectedArtifact: policy-fabric model-fabric binding fixtures, policy-pack schema updates, and validator tests
workItems.deliveryEvidence: Copilot implementation lane requires a visible PR and validation before completion.
workItems.acceptanceSummary: Policy binding fixtures are deterministic and local-only; runtime policy consumption does not introduce external credentials; make validate passes.

workItems.expectedArtifact: devsecops intelligence model-fabric telemetry integration and live metric collector stubs
workItems.deliveryEvidence: Codex dispatch recorded; findings are acceptable for investigation, but implementation delivery requires a GitHub artifact.
workItems.acceptanceSummary: Metric collector stubs emit deterministic telemetry records; no live GitHub API credentials; make validate stays green.

workItems.expectedArtifact: prophet-cli model-fabric delegation integration and release binary stubs
workItems.deliveryEvidence: Codex engagement is tracked separately from materialized PR delivery.
workItems.acceptanceSummary: Delegation wiring references model-fabric adapter contracts; release binary stubs do not publish; make validate passes.

workItems.expectedArtifact: SourceOSDesiredState schema, spec fixtures, and conformance tests
workItems.deliveryEvidence: Codex dispatch recorded; implementation delivery remains unverified until PR/branch/commit/merge exists.
workItems.acceptanceSummary: Schema and fixtures are deterministic and local-only; no boot implementation proof required at this stage; make validate passes.

workItems.expectedArtifact: BootReleaseSet schema, boot sequence fixtures, and conformance tests
workItems.deliveryEvidence: This status is valid only when a GitHub PR is visible; update deliveryEvidence with the PR URL during live-state refresh.
workItems.acceptanceSummary: Boot schema and fixtures are deterministic and local-only; no runtime boot execution required; make validate passes.

workItems.expectedArtifact: BootReleaseSet integration stubs and boot sequence adapter tests
workItems.deliveryEvidence: Copilot implementation lane requires visible PR evidence before completion.
workItems.acceptanceSummary: Boot fixtures reference SourceOSDesiredState spec records; schema is deterministic; no runtime boot execution required; make validate passes.
